task_completion.description: Load MRHead volume and navigate to the Sagittal view (side profile)
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Slicer interface shows the MRHead volume loaded. The main view or one of the slice views displays the Sagittal plane (side profile of the head/brain).

task_completion.description: Create a ruler/line annotation using the Markups module
task_completion.visual_evidence: A line or ruler markup is visible on the image slice. The Markups module or toolbar is active.

task_completion.description: Verify ruler measures the Corpus Callosum length correctly (approx 50-100mm)
task_completion.visual_evidence: The ruler endpoints are placed at the anterior (genu) and posterior (splenium) tips of the C-shaped Corpus Callosum. The displayed measurement value is between 50mm and 100mm.

task_completion.description: Create a text annotation near the measurement
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text label markup is visible on the slice view, positioned near the ruler annotation.

task_completion.description: Verify the text annotation contains the specific required string
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text annotation clearly reads 'Corpus Callosum - Normal'.

task_completion.description: Save the annotated view to the specified file path
task_completion.visual_evidence: The agent interacts with a save dialog or screen capture tool, saving a file named 'annotated_cc_report.png' to the '~/Documents/SlicerData/Screenshots/' directory.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent uses the Slicer GUI for annotations
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with Slicer's Markups module, toolbar, or mouse interactions on the slice view, rather than command-line image manipulation.

integrity.description: Ensure the measurement is a dynamic tool value, not manually typed text
integrity.visual_evidence: The measurement number is associated with the ruler line object (often colored similarly or attached), not a separate text box manually typed by the agent.

integrity.description: Ensure the screenshot is not edited in an external paint program
integrity.visual_evidence: The annotations appear as native Slicer 3D/2D objects within the Slicer application window, not as pixel-paint overlays in an external image editor.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The Corpus Callosum is the C-shaped white matter structure in the center of the brain (Sagittal view). Its anterior-posterior length in an adult MRI is typically between 50mm and 100mm. The required text annotation is 'Corpus Callosum - Normal'.
